div1.entryFree: Track (Ff tract) course, way; used of the sun: the envious clouds are bent to dim his glory and to stain the t. of his bright passage to the occident, R2 III, 3, 66. the weary sun hath made a golden set and, by the bright t. of his fiery car, gives signal of a goodly day, R3 V, 3, 20.
